text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur and I are finishing up a short-term
high-altitude training trip. I planned for us to
take a bus back to campus, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey. Will you quit moping already?
choice_data_list: I just can't believe how much it rained.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An unexpected downpour led to constant delays
and, ultimately, we missed the last bus.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Even with radar equipment, it's particularly
difficult to get precise weather measurements for
mountainous areas.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It takes quite an ego to think you can plan things
perfectly in the face of that. Let's just deal with
the practical matters at hand, and figure out how
we're going to get back.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
We can't get a phone signal here. And the map
doesn't show any houses or parking areas nearby.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But the GPS can still show us our current location.
I figure all we can do is walk down the mountain
until we get a signal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds easy enough, but she's been undergoing
intense high-altitude training. It'll take her some
time to recover, and I don't want to put any more
burden on her if I can help it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Whew.
Let's go.
choice_data_list: (If we could just get a signal...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look around and spot an open area in the
distance that I checked out when we first arrived
in the mountains.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey. What're you doing wandering all over the
place staring at your phone? You're distracting
me.
choice_data_list: I just wanted to check out the scenery.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
We're not here for sightseeing. Plus, I doubt your
body is used to the altitude yet.
choice_data_list: I'm not going to push myself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I didn't tell her at the time, but I was searching for
spots around the training area where I could get a
phone signal, just in case something like this
happened.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At that time, my phone was able to connect a few
times around the ridgeline and in some open
areas. The place I just spotted is near one of
those spots.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering the radio waves are travelling
downwards, there's a slight chance we might be
able to catch a signal! But we'd have to leave the
road, which presents its own risks...
choice_data_list: Wait here!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Huh?
Hey!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
choice_data_list: Thank goodness I was able to call for a car.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I managed to get a signal at the spot I had my
eye on, and people at the base of the mountain
sent a car up for us.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Was it really worth it? There was no need for you
to injure yourself.
choice_data_list: Tis but a scratch.
Tis but a scratch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was so absorbed in making my way through the
dark mountain path that I must have scraped
myself on a branch or something without realizing
it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What you should've done is tell me you were
looking for a place with a signal.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I could've analyzed the distance to the base
station and the topography to narrow down likely
spots. Though it still would've been so inefficient
and hardly worth the time...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It would've been way faster to just walk. So...
that's what we should've done.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Don't go wasting your energy like that.
choice_data_list:
It's not always a waste. I'd say it worked out
today.

It's not always a waste. I'd say it worked out
today.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Pure coincidence.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Like I said earlier, you should've told me what you
were trying to do. I would've gone instead, and it
would've been much faster.
choice_data_list: Maybe that's why I didn't say anything.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: I wanted to make sure you stayed safe.
I wanted to make sure you stayed safe.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...
No one asked you to do that.
choice_data_list: Just relax until we get back.
Just relax until we get back.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Tch. And yet look who passed out first.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: "Waste of energy," huh? I'm sure one to talk.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Look at those damn stars, twinkling up there.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(There was a time when people believed the
unscientific claim that the sky revolved around us.
But back then, the idea that the Earth was what
moved seemed crazy.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(All that energy spent arguing was wasted. Of
course, we all know that now.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: But I don't have time to wait for "someday" or "coincidences" to roll around for everyone to understand. I have to prove things now.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's just before midnight. I guess I can still do
everything I had planned tomorrow.
choice_data_list: Please just get plenty of rest.
Please just get plenty of rest.

Next time, I'll be ready for every possible
scenario.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's just before midnight. I guess I can still do
everything I had planned tomorrow.
choice_data_list: Please just get plenty of rest.
Please just get plenty of rest.

Next time, I'll be ready for every possible
scenario.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I'd have to be some kind of idiot to go
running.
choice_data_list:
I mean, I want you to give your brain a proper
rest as well.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. I'll be dedicating all my resources to
resting.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as you worked so hard to protect me and
all.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You do that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...And I will too.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But not today. All you need to do today is grab a
quick bath and hit the sack.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm serious. Don't even think about it.
...Later.
choice_data_list: Good night.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...
Thanks.
